postmark.Subject: Refinance — Patricia Simmons
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Refi for Patricia Simmons. Property at 287 Glencairn Avenue, Toronto, ON M5N 1V3, appraised $720,000. Targeting 65% LTV. Existing first mortgage with Scotiabank, balance $380k.

Loan application form is still being prepared by the borrower — I'll forward as soon as it's signed. Want to get the file in your queue with what I have.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

Jason Mercer
Mercer Mortgage Group
Lic. #M12001505
